_comment: Dual-economy catalogs (Economy Sprint 2). COINS buy gear + capacity here; PLANTS buy stat trees in entities.json upgrades. All values are PROVISIONAL and tunable without code changes. Gear lists are ordered, strictly-better tiers (no sidegrades). Prices are in coins.

weapon.name: Sturdy Stick
weapon.flavor: Not much, but it ends a slime.

weapon.name: Sword
weapon.flavor: His blade. Heavier than you remember.

armor.name: Padded Tunic
armor.flavor: Stitched wool. Better than bare skin.

armor.name: Leather Armor
armor.flavor: Cured hide from the old tannery.

armor.name: Chainmail
armor.flavor: Rings he forged, link by link.

boots.name: Dash Boots
boots.flavor: Springs in the heel. His clever work.

ranged.name: Sling
ranged.flavor: A child's weapon, until it isn't.

ranged.name: Hunting Bow
ranged.flavor: Yew and sinew. It still draws true.

sellPrices._comment: Plant sell value (coins) keyed by growthDays. Used by the Blacksmith→Farmstand split (Sprint magic-1). Farmstand BUY price = sell × FARMSTAND_MARKUP (Constants.js).

spells._comment: Spell catalog — souls UNLOCK + UPGRADE these at the Mage Mart (purification). Listed cheapest→most-expensive unlock (Ember cheapest, Sprout Sentinel most expensive); any-order, price-bounded. `unlock`/`upgrades` are in SOULS; `manaCost` is the per-cast MANA. Sprint magic-2: unlock = LEVEL 1 (immediately castable); each `upgrades` entry buys the next level (L2..L4) — so a spell's max level = 1 + upgrades.length. Ember is implemented end-to-end as the reusable template; the other five unlock to inert-but-owned until their cast is implemented against the same seam. Order in this list = secondary-slot order (slot 2 = first entry … slot 7 = last). All numbers TUNE.

list.name: Ember
list.flavor: A spark of cleansed flame. The first ember of the purified grove.

list.name: Thornlash
list.flavor: A whip of barbed bramble, lashed from the hedge.

list.name: Bramble Ward
list.flavor: A thorned shield of living hedge that turns the corrupted aside.

list.name: Pollen Bloom
list.flavor: A choking cloud of golden spores that withers what it touches.

list.name: Wild Growth
list.flavor: A verdant surge that knits flesh and root back whole.

list.name: Sprout Sentinel
list.flavor: Summon a guardian sprout from the soil to stand the watch.
